title: Spencer Museum, Charlotte Street announce Rocket Grants 2026 call for artists
summary_en: The Spencer Museum of Art at the University of Kansas and Charlotte Street have announced the 2026 open call for Rocket Grants, with applications opening May 6. The deadline to apply is June 27. An information session will be held May 21 at the Spencer Museum for artists interested in applying.
title_cn: 斯宾塞美术馆、夏洛特街基金会发布2026年度“火箭资助”艺术家征集公告

title: Study: Faced with a hotter future, America needs better data and response plans
summary_en: A new paper from researchers at the University of Kansas looks at extreme heat events in the United States, arguing a combination of inadequate data and unclear delineation of responsibility among government agencies leaves the nation unprepared for a hotter climate.
title_cn: 研究显示：面对更趋炎热的未来，美国需完善数据体系与应对预案

title: Lost history recovered: KU digital humanities team adds missing pages to The Call archives
summary_en: In a cardboard box tucked away in an office in the 18th and Vine District, a decade of Kansas City history was slowly turning into a collection of unreadable plastic circles. A KU librarian and three undergraduate students stepped in to preserve the archives from The Call.
title_cn: 失落历史得以复原：堪萨斯大学数字人文团队补全《呼声》档案缺失页面

title: KU nominates two undergraduates for Udall Scholarship
summary_en: Two undergraduates at the University of Kansas are nominees for Udall Scholarships, which recognize students who demonstrate leadership, public service and commitment in the fields of tribal public policy, Native health care or the environment.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学提名2名本科生参评尤德尔奖学金

title: Research finds journalism classes lack consistent approach to AI use across institutions
summary_en: Researchers at the University of Kansas analyzed syllabi from journalism classes from 15 universities across the United States, finding they took a varying approach to AI use when they acknowledged it at all. Some treated it as a threat, others permitted its use under strict boundaries, and others treated it as a subject of ethical inquiry. A standard approach could benefit students and schools, r
title_cn: 研究发现各院校新闻课程的人工智能应用缺乏统一规范

title: KU announces 2026-2030 Self Graduate Fellows
summary_en: In fall 2026, the fellowship reaches 67 total current fellows, making it the largest fellowship size ever in the program’s history. The total value of the four-year Madison and Lila Self Graduate Fellowship exceeds $275,000.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学公布2026-2030年度塞尔夫研究生奖学金获得者名单

title: Winners crowned at the 68th annual Snyder Book Collecting Contest
summary_en: The University of Kansas Libraries recently honored 11 student finalists and awarded cash prizes during a reception at Watson Library. Established in 1956, the contest is designed to encourage students to experience the joy of building personal libraries highlighting their unique interests and passions.
title_cn: 第68届斯奈德年度藏书比赛获胜名单公布

title: KU School of Business launching online master’s in business analytics for fall 2026
summary_en: The University of Kansas School of Business will begin offering an online version of its Master of Science in Business Analytics program this fall to better serve working professionals.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学商学院将于2026年秋季推出在线商务分析硕士项目

title: OneKU Denim Day brings global perspectives on sexual violence to university
summary_en: The University of Kansas will host OneKU Denim Day on April 29, featuring film screenings and a panel discussion exploring sexual violence in the U.S. and Japan. The free, public event aims to promote awareness, dialogue and support for survivors.
title_cn: “同一个堪大”牛仔日活动为该校带来性暴力问题全球视角

title: KU Veterans Alumni Network to host reception for university’s military-affiliated community
summary_en: The KU Veterans Alumni Network will host its End-of-Year Reception on May 7 at the Jayhawk Welcome Center. The event is open to the public. Faculty, staff, students, alumni and friends are invited to attend in support of KU’s military-affiliated community.
title_cn: 堪萨斯大学退伍军人校友网络将为该校涉军群体举办招待会
